production.playableLoop: Steer the skiff along the moonlit river, collect three signal flares, avoid drifting logs, and return to the dock before the timer expires.
production.objective: Collect 3 of 3 signal flares and reach the home dock within 50 seconds.
production.failRetry: Log contact or timeout enters a failed state; Space resets skiff, flares, timer, score, and HUD. Winning also allows Space replay.

assetSourcing.playerHero: SQLite catalog searches for vehicle and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as a custom low-poly skiff with cabin and bow light.
assetSourcing.obstacleEnemy: SQLite catalog searches for environment and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as drifting river logs with readable hazard silhouettes.
assetSourcing.rewardInteractable: SQLite catalog searches for collectible and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as emissive signal flares.
assetSourcing.worldEnvironment: SQLite catalog searches for environment and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as water, banks, dock, reeds, rocks, buoys, and beacon lamps.
assetSourcing.audioFeedback: Starter local goal-ping audio asset remains available as local fallback provenance; runtime trigger wiring is deferred until audio facade proof is part of this game loop.
